title: yinshania acutangula subsp. acutangula
intro: Yinshania acutangula subsp. acutangula, also known as Yinshania acutangula, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae, native to China. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Yinshania acutangula include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and improving digestion. Yinshania acutangula is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can also be used to make topical creams and ointments for skin conditions.
